features: all callback-based central, reseller, customer and master menus are rendered as Telegram reply keyboards
dynamic plan, service, order and management buttons are routed through D1-backed per-chat reply routes
URL and copy actions are delivered as normal bot messages instead of inline glass buttons
Telegram chat menu button uses the commands menu rather than a WebApp glass button
existing callback handlers remain compatible through synthetic callback dispatch

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot

validation.reply_keyboard_runtime_simulation: passed: send, edit, dynamic route lookup, route cleanup and synthetic callback acknowledgement
validation.inline_keyboard_runtime_interception: passed for central, reseller and processor Telegram wrappers
validation.telegram_live_api: not run; requires a real bot token

limitations: Old inline buttons in historical Telegram messages cannot be removed without their message IDs; all newly rendered bot menus use reply keyboards.
